overview: Bamm Book Builder is a children's book creation platform that produces print-ready PDFs for Amazon KDP and IngramSpark. Users create and edit books with pages, images, and text, then export KDP-compliant interior and full-wrap cover PDFs for self-publishing.
features: Create and manage children's book projects
Page-by-page editor with image uploads and text
KDP-compliant interior PDF export (8.75x8.75" with full-bleed)
Full-wrap cover PDF export with dynamic spine width calculation
Subscription gating via Stripe billing integration
